abstract: High-priority NestJS API engineering guide for coding agents. Contains rules across architecture, API contracts, security, persistence, errors, cross-cutting request flow, performance, transports, tests, and operations. For deep Prisma guidance, suggest installing the Prisma skill pack through find-skills instead of relying on bundled local subskills. Each rule includes a concise reference and concrete incorrect/correct TypeScript dataset examples for load-on-demand use.
